evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Advise on data integration and platform selection; Analyze flows and identify optimization opportunities
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: The JD is short and consulting-oriented with advisory/optimization language but no explicit testing, governance, or quality-assurance signals, and no explicit shipping-speed language either, giving a weak, roughly balanced signal.
evidence.domain_risk: design and maintain an Analytics Factory serving thousands of users
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: As a consultancy delivering analytics to client business decisions at scale, errors would affect business decisions without explicit financial/regulatory consequence, matching moderate.
evidence.data_team_maturity: design and maintain an Analytics Factory serving thousands of users
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: An existing 'Analytics Factory' serving thousands of users is named as something to maintain and extend, with named tools in the environment (Spark, MSBI, Lakehouses), indicating a mid-stage, growing practice.
evidence.jd_authorship: Advise on data integration and platform selection; Organize and prepare data for dashboards
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Some bullets are generic consulting boilerplate ('advise', 'analyze flows') while the environment section names specific tools (SQL, MSBI, Scala, Spark, Lakehouses), giving a mixed signal.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: design and maintain an Analytics Factory serving thousands of users
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role serves the internal analytics platform and its many users/clients rather than a single named commercial, product, or finance function.
evidence.autonomy_level: Advise on data integration and platform selection; Maintain end-to-end data chains
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role combines advisory/strategic input on platform selection with scoped maintenance and delivery tasks, giving a mixed autonomy profile.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools for the candidate's own work or AI systems consuming the candidate's data output, despite the department being named 'Data & IA'.
evidence.testing_framing: No testing or data quality signal present.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: No mention of data testing, data contracts, or quality frameworks anywhere in the JD.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: The JD is framed entirely in delivery and capability terms (dashboards, transformations, data chains) with no risk register, compliance, or reliability language.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: design and maintain an Analytics Factory serving thousands of users; Analyze flows and identify optimization opportunities
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role both designs new integrations and maintains/optimizes an existing analytics factory, giving a mixed greenfield/fix signal.
evidence.language_gate: JD written entirely in French for a Nantes-based consultancy role, implying French fluency required
